name: AZURE_CLIENT_ID
notes: GitHub OIDC client id for jobs release and deploy workflows.

name: AZURE_TENANT_ID
notes: Azure tenant id discovered from az account show when available.

name: AZURE_SUBSCRIPTION_ID
notes: Azure subscription id discovered from az account show when available.

name: RESOURCE_GROUP
notes: Shared runtime resource group owned by control-plane provisioning.

name: ACR_NAME
notes: Shared Azure Container Registry name.

name: ACR_PULL_IDENTITY_NAME
notes: User-assigned identity used by jobs to pull from ACR.

name: CONTAINER_APPS_ENVIRONMENT_NAME
notes: Shared Container Apps environment name.

name: SERVICE_ACCOUNT_NAME
notes: Shared workload identity or service account name.

name: AZURE_STORAGE_ACCOUNT_NAME
notes: Primary storage account for runtime data.

name: AZURE_CONTAINER_COMMON
notes: Canonical common container name.

name: AZURE_CONTAINER_BRONZE
notes: Canonical bronze container name.

name: AZURE_CONTAINER_SILVER
notes: Canonical silver container name.

name: AZURE_CONTAINER_GOLD
notes: Canonical gold container name.

name: AZURE_FOLDER_MARKET
notes: Canonical market folder name.

name: AZURE_FOLDER_FINANCE
notes: Canonical finance folder name.

name: AZURE_FOLDER_EARNINGS
notes: Canonical earnings folder name.

name: AZURE_FOLDER_TARGETS
notes: Canonical price-target folder name.

name: CONTRACTS_REPOSITORY
notes: Sibling contracts repo slug used by workflows.

name: CONTRACTS_REF
notes: Contracts ref to validate against by default.

name: CONTROL_PLANE_REPOSITORY
notes: Sibling control-plane repo slug used by repository_dispatch.

name: DEBUG_SYMBOLS
notes: Optional debug symbols for jobs workflows.

name: BACKFILL_START_DATE
notes: Default backfill start date.

name: RANKING_START_DATE
notes: Optional ranking start date.

name: RANKING_END_DATE
notes: Optional ranking end date.

name: RANKING_STRATEGY_NAME
notes: Optional ranking strategy name.

name: BRONZE_MARKET_JOB
notes: ACA Jobs resource name for bronze market sync.

name: BRONZE_FINANCE_JOB
notes: ACA Jobs resource name for bronze finance sync.

name: BRONZE_PRICE_TARGET_JOB
notes: ACA Jobs resource name for bronze price-target sync.

name: BRONZE_EARNINGS_JOB
notes: ACA Jobs resource name for bronze earnings sync.

name: SILVER_MARKET_JOB
notes: ACA Jobs resource name for silver market sync.

name: SILVER_FINANCE_JOB
notes: ACA Jobs resource name for silver finance sync.

name: SILVER_PRICE_TARGET_JOB
notes: ACA Jobs resource name for silver price-target sync.

name: SILVER_EARNINGS_JOB
notes: ACA Jobs resource name for silver earnings sync.

name: GOLD_MARKET_JOB
notes: ACA Jobs resource name for gold market sync.

name: GOLD_FINANCE_JOB
notes: ACA Jobs resource name for gold finance sync.

name: GOLD_PRICE_TARGET_JOB
notes: ACA Jobs resource name for gold price-target sync.

name: GOLD_EARNINGS_JOB
notes: ACA Jobs resource name for gold earnings sync.

name: GOLD_REGIME_JOB
notes: ACA Jobs resource name for regime recompute.

name: PLATINUM_RANKINGS_JOB
notes: ACA Jobs resource name for platinum rankings.

name: BACKTEST_JOB
notes: ACA Jobs resource name for backtests.

name: JOB_STARTUP_API_CONTAINER_APPS
notes: Container Apps that jobs may wake before running.

name: ALPHA_VANTAGE_EARNINGS_FRESH_DAYS
notes: Alpha Vantage earnings freshness window.

name: ALPHA_VANTAGE_FINANCE_FRESH_DAYS
notes: Alpha Vantage finance freshness window.

name: ALPHA_VANTAGE_MAX_WORKERS
notes: Alpha Vantage worker concurrency.

name: ALPHA_VANTAGE_TIMEOUT_SECONDS
notes: Alpha Vantage timeout.

name: MASSIVE_FINANCE_FRESH_DAYS
notes: Massive finance freshness window.

name: MASSIVE_MAX_WORKERS
notes: Massive worker concurrency.

name: MASSIVE_TIMEOUT_SECONDS
notes: Massive timeout.

name: ASSET_ALLOCATION_API_BASE_URL
notes: Control-plane base url used by jobs HTTP clients.

name: ASSET_ALLOCATION_API_SCOPE
notes: Managed-identity scope used for jobs to control-plane auth.

name: AZURE_STORAGE_CONNECTION_STRING
notes: Storage connection string. Never auto-discovered.

name: NASDAQ_API_KEY
notes: Nasdaq API key. Never auto-discovered.

name: POSTGRES_DSN
notes: Jobs Postgres connection string. Never auto-discovered.
